title: Image uploader
description: Centered photo upload component with circular avatar, hover camera overlay, click-to-upload and drag & drop. Used in profile settings and user configuration forms.

variants.label: Empty
variants.description: No photo loaded. Shows IBM Carbon person icon as placeholder.

variants.label: Filled
variants.description: Photo loaded. Avatar shows preview via background-image. Hover reveals camera overlay.

variants.label: Drag over
variants.description: User drags a file over the container. Border turns blue, background turns var(--b1).

code:
Cambiar

Tamaño sugerido 224×224 px (PNG o JPG)

/* ── CSS ── */ .dt-img-upload { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 24px 20px; background: var(--n2); border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--n3); transition: border-color .15s, background .15s; } .dt-img-upload.drag-over { border-color: var(--b5); background: var(--b1); } .dt-img-circle { position: relative; width: 88px; height: 88px; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; } .dt-img-av { width: 88px; height: 88px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--n3); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--n5); overflow: hidden; background-size: cover; background-position: center; } .dt-img-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(19,32,69,.60); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 3px; color: #fff; font: 600 10px var(--font-sans); letter-spacing: .03em; opacity: 0; transition: opacity .18s; pointer-events: none; } .dt-img-circle:hover .dt-img-overlay { opacity: 1; } .dt-img-replace { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; font: 600 13px var(--font-sans); color: var(--b6); transition: color .12s; } .dt-img-replace:hover { color: var(--b7); } .dt-img-hint { font: 400 11px var(--font-sans); color: var(--n5); margin: 0; } /* ── JS ── */ function imgDragOver(e) { e.preventDefault(); document.getElementById('img-upload-zone').classList.add('drag-over'); } function imgDragLeave(e) { document.getElementById('img-upload-zone').classList.remove('drag-over'); } function imgDrop(e) { e.preventDefault(); document.getElementById('img-upload-zone').classList.remove('drag-over'); const file = e.dataTransfer.files[0]; if (file) applyImg(file); } function imgSelected(e) { const file = e.target.files[0]; if (file) applyImg(file); } function applyImg(file) { if (!file.type.match(/image\/(jpeg|png)/)) return; if (file.size > 2 * 1024 * 1024) return; const reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = ev => { const av = document.getElementById('img-av'); av.innerHTML = ''; av.style.backgroundImage = `url(${ev.target.result})`; }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); }
pageUsage:
Source: sections/components/image-uploader.json
Used in: DES-827 Profile Settings, user creation forms

Behavior:
- Click avatar or 'Reemplazar imagen' → OS file picker
- Drag file onto container → same upload flow
- Accepts: image/jpeg, image/png, max 2 MB
- On load: .dt-img-av gets background-image with preview
- Hover avatar → camera overlay transitions in (opacity 0→1)
- Drag over → .drag-over class on container (blue border + bg)
